positive: A symmetrical, high-contrast graphic illustration of an ethereal bioluminescent forest scene. The composition features stylized, intricate silhouettes of glowing exotic flora, celestial vines, and fantastical mushrooms emerging from deep shadows. The color palette is dominated by deep indigo, neon cyan, and electric violet, contrasting sharply against a matte black background. The style is elegant, highly detailed vector art, with perfect linework, clean boundaries, and a magical, otherworldly depth. Central composition, perfect for apparel printing, graphic novel aesthetic, maximal detail, symmetry.
